text:
Created attachment 151896
rsync.in.diff

Hi Emanuel,

I hope the attached diff saticfies your needs. There is one thing though where I'm not too sure if I provided the variable correctly.

in order to aim for /usr/local/etc I used %%ETCDIR%%. Yet It confuses me to see some Makefiles using %%STAGEDIR%%/%%ETCDIR%%. So in case %%STAGEDIR%% is required, then please replace all "%%ETCDIR%%" by "%%STAGEDIR%%/%%ETCDIR%%".

- rsync.in.old
- rsync.in.new
are both provided in case of a required substitution (which I don't think is necessary from my point of understanding)

Thank you
